title: 400ml, Garden Colour Spray Paint, Matt Finish (1, Lavender)
features: COVERAGE: Matt finish garden spray paint provides even coverage and a durable finish for outdoor garden items and furniture
QUICK APPLICATION: Easy-to-use aerosol spray format ensures smooth application and fast drying for efficient project completion
WEATHER RESISTANT: Specially formulated to withstand outdoor conditions, protecting your garden items from the elements
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for refreshing and protecting various garden items including planters, furniture, and decorative features
SPECIFICATIONS: 400ml can of coloured paint with water-based formula for convenient application and cleanup
description: Transform your outdoor items with this Garden Colour Spray Paint in a sophisticated multi-colour shade. This versatile 400ml spray paint features a matt finish that adds a subtle, contemporary touch to your garden accessories and furniture. The water-based formula is specifically designed for garden use, providing excellent coverage and adherence to various surfaces. Perfect for refreshing plant pots, garden furniture, ornaments, and other outdoor items that need a new lease of life. The matt finish helps mask surface imperfections while creating a modern, understated look. The spray format ensures easy application and even coverage, helping you reach difficult angles and corners. These different shades complements natural garden settings beautifully, allowing your painted items to blend harmoniously with your outdoor space. For best results, ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application.
